claim_scope: Certified compact-relay coverage: W(t,beta)<0 for every 6<=beta<=15 and 0.6<=t<=pi-1.5/beta. The outward-rounded Arb proof uses a bivariate Taylor model with exact central mixed derivatives, absolute Lagrange remainders, positive Bessel-series tails, and 90 contiguous beta boxes containing 3222 certified t boxes. This closes G3 only; it does not discharge G1, G2, G4, G5, or the status of CWIN=3/2 in the moving-edge splice.
